response.overview: Three teenage friends, Paolo, Simone and Sibilla, are on holiday in the countryside, near a large park, enclosed by a wall and guarded by armed officers, who make friends with a local boy, Toni. They enter the headquarters of the Klon institute, a mysterious laboratory, directed by professor Zygote, who officially deals only reproductive cloning of plants and frogs, in fact has already secretly cloned men. In this sensational discovery some businessmen are involved, led by Commander Colomba, who travel by helicopter to deal with Zygote, without being able to complete the purchase of 600 million clones, which should consume the polluted in the world today: Zygote claims to be the manager of the deal. While the boys are taken prisoner, and Zygote thinks to clone the, three thieves enter the institute - sent by Colomba -and they discover, hidden in the "freezer", thousands of clone already available....
response.title: Klon
